overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game depicting three characters navigating a dark, overgrown rocky path at night before entering an abandoned wooden house. The footage features cinematic lighting with flashlight illumination and detailed post-apocalyptic environmental design.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following two companions through a narrow, rocky path at night. The surroundings are overgrown with tall grass and large boulders, creating an enclosed feeling. Ahead, the dark facade of an abandoned wooden house becomes increasingly visible as the group approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict house interior entryway with debris

events.description: character moves from outdoor rocky path into the abandoned house through a doorway
flashlight activates, illuminating the dark interior debris and walls

agents.ego_description: moving through the doorway into the dark interior, following companions closely

notable_agents.action: companions entering the dark house ahead of the player character

entered.detail: open doorway frame leading into the pitch-black interior of the house
scattered rubble, broken wood, and trash covering the concrete floor
dirty concrete flooring visible just inside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the abandoned house through a wooden doorway, transitioning from the outdoor path to a dark interior. A flashlight beam illuminates debris scattered across the concrete floor as the group moves deeper into the narrow corridor. The exterior elements disappear from view as the camera focuses on the damaged walls and dark passage ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic outdoor trail into the oppressive darkness of a derelict building. It begins by trailing two companions along a narrow, rocky path flanked by large boulders and overgrown tall grass. As the group advances, the dark facade of an abandoned wooden house looms ahead, drawing the camera toward the structure. The scene then shifts as the characters cross the threshold of a wooden doorway, transitioning from the open night air into a dim interior. Finally, the flashlight beam cuts through the gloom to reveal debris scattered across a concrete floor while the camera moves deeper into a narrow, damaged corridor.
